subject: [PATCH v3 15/16] userfaultfd.2: Add read-write protect mode

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds support for read-write protect mode to the userfaultfd API, which allows user-space to receive notifications on any access (read or write) to a present page within a registered range. The new registration-mode entry and matching UAPI are documented in the man2/userfaultfd.2 file. The patch also includes documentation for the new pagefault flag and VERSIONS line. This feature is supported starting from Linux 7.2.
